subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §16 Expected Value of a Function of a Discrete Random Variable
question: A box contains 7 marbles of which 3 are red and 4 are blue. Randomly select two marbles without replacement. If the marbles are of the same color then you win $2, otherwise you lose $1. Let $X$ be the random variable representing your net winnings. (a) Find the probability mass function of $X$. (b) Compute $E(2X)$.
